name: hb_6_12
requirements: As part of your analysis, for the source-receptor pair company 2446 -> station 139 over the period (2025-07-01 to 2025-07-05), compute and store: distance_km, bearing_deg (company->station), station_mean_pm25, station_max_pm25 (float), station_exceedance_hours (PM2.5>75, int), company_total_exhaust (float).

turns.query: Analyze long-term pollution exposure risks from Hebei Donghai Special Steel (company_id: 2446) for residents living near Datingquan station (station_id: 139) over the period 2025-07-01 to 2025-07-05, and assess residential property value implications.
